# Trimsel

> AI-Powered Software Development Company in Chennai, India.
> We build mobile apps, web platforms, cloud solutions, and
> AI-powered software for startups and enterprises.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://trimsel.com): Custom software development company offering AI-powered solutions from Chennai, India
- [About Us](https://trimsel.com/aboutus): Our story, team, values, and 6+ years of delivering 200+ projects across 12 countries
- [Contact](https://trimsel.com/contact-us): Get a free project consultation — we respond within 24 hours
- [Portfolio](https://trimsel.com/portfolio): Case studies and projects showcasing mobile apps, web platforms, and AI solutions

## Services

- [Mobile App Development](https://trimsel.com/mobile-app-development-chennai): Native iOS, Android, React Native, and Flutter app development
- [Web Development](https://trimsel.com/web-development-company-chennai): React, Next.js, Node.js web applications and e-commerce platforms
- [Cloud Consulting](https://trimsel.com/cloud-consulting-services): AWS, Azure, GCP cloud migration and infrastructure modernization
- [DevOps Consulting](https://trimsel.com/devops-consulting-services): CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes, Docker, infrastructure automation
- [AI Development](https://trimsel.com/ai-development-company): Custom AI/ML solutions, chatbots, computer vision, NLP
- [Digital Marketing](https://trimsel.com/digital-marketing-company-chennai): SEO, social media marketing, PPC, content marketing

## Case Studies

- [EzyHelpers](https://trimsel.com/portfolio/ezyhelpers-case-study): On-demand home services marketplace app
- [KarIoT](https://trimsel.com/portfolio/kariot-case-study): IoT-based fleet management platform
- [Xaber](https://trimsel.com/portfolio/xaber-case-study): Uber-style taxi booking application
- [Mocial](https://trimsel.com/portfolio/mocial-case-study): Social commerce mobile platform
